functions.name: @ir_diff_set_literal
llvm_blocks:
entry:
  ; exec body#0
  ; set literal -> reml_set_new
  %set1 = call ptr @reml_set_new()
  ; set element 0
  %set2 = call ptr @reml_set_insert(ptr %set1, i64 1)
  ; set element 1
  %set3 = call ptr @reml_set_insert(ptr %set2, i64 2)
  ; set element 2
  %set4 = call ptr @reml_set_insert(ptr %set3, i64 1)
  ret %set4
